apiKey.title: Iron Gate API Key
apiKey.description: The organization's Iron Gate API key (starts with ig_). Required for the extension to communicate with the Iron Gate backend.

apiUrl.title: Iron Gate API URL
apiUrl.description: The base URL for the Iron Gate API endpoint. Defaults to https://irongate-api.onrender.com/v1 if not set.

firmMode.title: Protection Mode
firmMode.description: Data protection mode. 'audit' = Monitor only (detect and log). 'proxy' = Protect (auto-pseudonymize PII before sending to AI tools).

firmId.title: Firm ID
firmId.description: The organization's firm UUID for event attribution and policy enforcement.

firmName.title: Organization Name
firmName.description: Display name for the organization shown in the extension side panel.

enrollmentCode.title: Enrollment Code
enrollmentCode.description: Auto-enrollment code for new users. When set, users are automatically associated with this firm on first launch without manual setup.

localLLMEndpoint.title: Private LLM Endpoint
localLLMEndpoint.description: URL of the organization's on-premise LLM (e.g., http://llm.internal:11434). When set, prompts containing highly sensitive content (as determined by Executive Lens) are routed to this endpoint instead of cloud AI tools.

localLLMModel.title: Private LLM Model
localLLMModel.description: Model name for the private LLM endpoint (e.g., 'gemma4:e2b', 'mistral:7b'). Defaults to 'gemma4:e2b' if not specified — IronGate's validated default.

sensitivityThresholdWarn.title: Warning Threshold
sensitivityThresholdWarn.description: Sensitivity score threshold (0-100) at which users see a warning before sending. Default: 30.

sensitivityThresholdBlock.title: Block Threshold
sensitivityThresholdBlock.description: Sensitivity score threshold (0-100) at which prompts are blocked from sending. Default: 80.

allowedAITools.title: Allowed AI Tools
allowedAITools.description: Comma-separated list of permitted AI tool domains. If set, only these tools are allowed. Example: 'chatgpt.com,claude.ai'. Leave empty to allow all supported tools.

blockedAITools.title: Blocked AI Tools
blockedAITools.description: Comma-separated list of blocked AI tool domains. Example: 'chat.deepseek.com'. Takes priority over allowedAITools.

disableFileUpload.title: Disable File Upload Scanning
disableFileUpload.description: When true, blocks all file uploads to AI tools regardless of sensitivity score.

complianceFrameworks.title: Active Compliance Frameworks
complianceFrameworks.description: Comma-separated compliance frameworks to enforce. Options: GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2, PCI_DSS, CCPA, FERPA, SOX, ITAR. Example: 'HIPAA,SOC2'.

siemEndpoint.title: SIEM Endpoint
siemEndpoint.description: URL for forwarding security events to your SIEM (Splunk HEC, Sentinel, QRadar). Events are sent in CEF format.

siemToken.title: SIEM Authentication Token
siemToken.description: Bearer token or HEC token for authenticating to the SIEM endpoint.

glinerEnabled.title: Enable On-Device ML Detection
glinerEnabled.description: Enable the GLiNER on-device ML model for enhanced entity detection. Requires ~46MB model download. Default: false.

sessionLockTimeout.title: Session Lock Timeout (minutes)
sessionLockTimeout.description: Auto-lock the extension after this many minutes of inactivity. User must re-authenticate to continue. Default: 30. Set to 0 to disable.

disableOverride.title: Disable User Override
disableOverride.description: When true, users cannot override block decisions. Prompts exceeding the block threshold are always blocked with no bypass option.
